boundarylogic 0.1.0

    Getting Started with Boundary Logic: Phases 1–3 Boundary Logic with Real Clinical Data: The Pima Diabetes Dataset

    Assemble Phase 1 artifacts into a single result object

    bl_assemble.Rd

    Combines the outputs of bl_prepare_data(), optionally bl_filter_outliers(), bl_fit_model(), bl_build_projection(), and bl_build_grid() into a single bl_result S3 object. This object is the reproducible anchor for all Phase 2 operations (counterfactual search, local interpretation, global interpretation).

    Usage

    bl_assemble(bl_data, bl_filter_result = NULL, bl_model, bl_projection, bl_grid)

    Arguments

    bl_data

    A "bl_data" object from bl_prepare_data().

    bl_filter_result

    A "bl_filter_result" from bl_filter_outliers(), or NULL if no polygon filtering was applied.

    bl_model

    A "bl_model" from bl_fit_model().

    bl_projection

    A "bl_projection" from bl_build_projection().

    bl_grid

    A "bl_grid" from bl_build_grid().

    Value

    A list of class "bl_result" containing all Phase 1 artifacts. See Value section for the full field list.

    Phase 1 workflow

    # Step 1: prepare data
bl_dat  <- bl_prepare_data(datasets::iris, class_col = "Species",
                            target_class = "versicolor")

# Step 2 (optional): iterative polygon filter
bl_filt <- bl_filter_outliers(bl_dat, hull_fraction = 0.9)

# Step 3: fit final model (on filtered data)
bl_mod  <- bl_fit_model(bl_filt$train_data, bl_filt$var_names,
                         model_type = "GLM")

# Step 4: build projection
bl_proj <- bl_build_projection(bl_filt$train_data, bl_filt$var_names,
                                method = "PCA")

# Step 5: build prediction grid
bl_grid <- bl_build_grid(bl_filt$train_data, bl_proj, bl_mod)

# Step 6: assemble
result  <- bl_assemble(bl_dat, bl_filt, bl_mod, bl_proj, bl_grid)

    Value (fields of bl_result)

    train_data

    Post-filter training data frame.

    test_data

    Test data frame (filtered to training variable ranges).

    var_names

    Feature column names.

    num_vars

    Number of features.

    model

    Fitted model object.

    model_type

    Character; model family.

    cutoff

    Decision threshold.

    rounding

    Rounding precision.

    V

    Loading matrix (p x p).

    tV

    Inverse of V (p x p).

    X_center

    Column means.

    X_sd

    Column standard deviations.

    method

    "PCA" or "CVA".

    standardise

    Effective standardise flag.

    proj_dims

    Integer vector of length 2; eigenvector indices used for the 2D projection plane.

    biplot_obj

    The biplotEZ object for Phase 2 plotting.

    polygon

    Convex hull polygon (SpatialPolygons or NULL).

    hull_fraction

    Hull fraction used, or NULL.

    biplot_grid

    The full bl_grid list.

    accuracy

    Training accuracy.

    gini

    Training Gini coefficient.

    call

    The R call that created this object.

    created_at

    POSIXct creation timestamp.

    On this page
